issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were enrolling in multiple workflow branches simultaneously, causing HAs and TCs to receive duplicate tasks across post-referral and pre-referral workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the extra duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had already been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for these terminal deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the filters on March 9th to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral tasks that appeared for deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that deal stage 'Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criteria in the workflow. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window but did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to agents continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated one. A HA reported that emails still showed the old LO Paul instead of the updated LO Julie Yocum. Luis investigated and resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: For any deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually resend the agent introduction email with the correct LO information.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals being updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment, meaning TCs were not receiving their expected tasks for these deals. The issue affected deals without a lender assigned, which is standard for MRC leads. Madelaine spoke with HubSpot support and confirmed the issue was fixed.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are generated.
